title: Nether Sky
description: Adds a skybox to the Nether.
body:
(This is a fork of [SpaceCandy](https://github.com/StarLegacy/SpaceCandy).)

Adds a skybox to the Nether. Included is a default skybox, with dark clouds and a hellish aesthetic. You should be able to override the textures using a normal resource pack if you want to customize it further.

This mod is completely client-side; it does not need to be installed on servers.


_
Feel free to submit your own skybox if you want it included in this mod. If I like it, it may become the new default._
